title: Clean Power 2030 metrics
body: "The data presented is on the Clean Power 2030 metrics - the share of Great Britain’s electricity generation produced by clean sources; the share of Great Britain’s electricity demand met by clean sources; and estimated emissions intensity of Great Britain’s electricity generation. Tables 1 and 2 are published annually, in GWh and percentage shares. Table 3 is published annually, in GWh and gCO2e/kWh.  Enquiries about these statistics should be directed to electricitystatistics@energysecurity.gov.uk "

taxons.title: Energy and climate change: evidence and analysis
